headline: Record North Slope lease sale by supermajors shines fresh light on 88 Energy's Alaskan ambitions
summary: ExxonMobil, ConocoPhillips, Repsol and Shell have just competed at the most successful lease sale ever held in Alaska's National Petroleum Reserve. The timing could hardly be better for 88 Energy Ltd (AIM:88E, ASX:88E, OTCQB:EEENF, FRA:POQ), the AIM-listed explorer advancing plans to drill...

headline: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait
summary: Donald Trump warned the U.S. will completely obliterate all of Iran's electric generating plants, oil wells and Kharg Island if a peace deal is not reached.

headline: ConocoPhillips: Oman Pleas Highlight Industry Uncertainty
summary: ConocoPhillips faces operational and financial risks due to Iranian attacks impacting its 30% stake in QatarEnergy's Ras Laffan LNG facility. Read more on COP here.

headline: European markets close higher as Iran war intensifies and economic sentiment sours
summary: European stocks closed in positive territory on Monday though the war in Iran showed no signs of ending soon, entering its fifth week.
